name: findemm
description: Local-first, evidence-based recruiter enrichment for Chrome.

scripts.precommit: npm run test && npm run check
scripts.package:store: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-store.ps1
scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/lib.js && node --check server/hunter.js && node --check server/suppressions.js && node --check extension/capture.js && node --check extension/state.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node --check extension/background.js
